meaning: adj.[希神]乌拉尼亚的,天的,天文学的,天国的,[天]天王星的
examples: Correlations of satellite positions and ring features occur in the jovian uranian and neptunian systems as well.
Uranian atmosphere, by composition, is 83% hydrogen, 15% helium and 2% methane although traces of other hydrocarbons have been found.
Work on Uranian rings and some general problems of the planetary rings including the collision process in the rings, the photometric theory and their origin are also elucidated.
